step_rationale: Lysosomal protease in macrophages; elevated in atherosclerosis; ECM degradation.
mechanism: Cathepsin K is a macrophage lysosomal protease elevated in atherosclerosis, contributing to fibrous-cap matrix degradation.

references.title: Endothelial dysfunction, arterial stiffening, and intima-media thickening in large arteries from HIV-1 transgenic mice.
